cards.title: Dikarete tsa go Kwala
cards.subtitle: Kopanya 'kaitaetso ya go kwala + laeborari ya setaele + laeborari ya tshedimosetso + tswelopele + ditlhokego tse di oketsegileng', dirisa ka tlhobolo fa o dira
cards.extraReqPh: Sekai: tsenya potso ya go akanya kwa bokhutlong jwa kgaolo nngwe le nngwe…
cards.empty: Ga o na dikarete tsa bokwadi, tlobola konopo kwa godimo ka fa letshogong go dira e ntšha
cards.deleteConfirm: A o netefatsa go ntsha? Tiragatso e ga e ka boelwa morago.

catHint.continuation: E tla dira diteng tsa morago go ya ka setlhangwa se se tlhophilweng
